title: Trisetum barbatipaleum
taxonomy: Trisetum barbatipaleum is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Poeae and is further classified under the subfamily Pooideae. As a member of the genus Trisetum, it is closely related to other grasses in this group. The classification of Trisetum barbatipaleum is also reflected in its botanical name, which indicates its relationship to other plants in the plant kingdom. By understanding its classification, botanists and researchers can better understand the evolutionary history and relationships of this species.
